REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATHAN, JUNE NATHAN, RAND AS TO DEFENDANT COYNE, BRIAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COYNE, BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 119 CAPISTRANO AVE, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522 JUDGEMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $118.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATHAN, JUNE NATHAN, RAND AS TO DEFENDANT COYNE, BRIAN
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATHAN, JUNE NATHAN, RAND

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATHAN, JUNE NATHAN, RAND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COYNE, BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 9/6/96 $1,019.88 RENT, $118.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,137.88, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COYNE, BRIAN
